data.content: I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-04-07T15:57:55.223Z</current_datetime>

I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

data.content:
Run:

```
dotnet run --project TestProject.csproj -- --filter "/*/*/SmsNotificationTests/*"
```

TUnit uses `dotnet run` (not `dotnet test`) and its filter pattern follows the format `assembly/namespace/class/method`. The wildcard `*` matches any segment, so `/*/*/SmsNotificationTests/*` filters to all tests in the `SmsNotificationTests` class.
